entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments with a value of -13,764,000 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeInterestExpenseInterestIncomeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterestsNet is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments with a value of 0 in the extension taxonomy role 0003 - Statement - Condensed Interim Consolidated Statements of (Loss) Income and Comprehensive (Loss) Income (Unaudited), but us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments fact are:
Period :2025-04-01 to 2025-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - exhibit99-1.htm 2213

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments with a value of 9,651,000 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeInterestExpenseInterestIncomeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterestsNet is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments with a value of -311,000 in the extension taxonomy role 0003 - Statement - Condensed Interim Consolidated Statements of (Loss) Income and Comprehensive (Loss) Income (Unaudited), but us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments fact are:
Period :2024-10-01 to 2024-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - exhibit99-1.htm 2210

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments with a value of 25,766,000 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeInterestExpenseInterestIncomeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterestsNet is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments with a value of -311,000 in the extension taxonomy role 0003 - Statement - Condensed Interim Consolidated Statements of (Loss) Income and Comprehensive (Loss) Income (Unaudited), but us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments fact are:

Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - exhibit99-1.htm 2216

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:ProceedsFromSaleOfOtherInvestments with a value of 658,000 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInInvestingActivities is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:PaymentsForProceedsFromInvestments with a value of 0 in the extension taxonomy role 0005 - Statement - Condensed Interim Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows (Unaudited), but us-gaap:ProceedsFromSaleOfOtherInvestments is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:PaymentsForProceedsFromInvestments in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:ProceedsFromSaleOfOtherInvestments fact are:
Period :2024-04-01 to 2024-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - exhibit99-1.htm 3839

property.name: label
property.value: Proceeds from Sale of Other Investments

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments with a value of -13,654,000 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeInterestExpenseInterestIncomeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterestsNet is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments with a value of 0 in the extension taxonomy role 0003 - Statement - Condensed Interim Consolidated Statements of (Loss) Income and Comprehensive (Loss) Income (Unaudited), but us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:UnrealizedGainLossOnInvestments fact are:
Period :2025-10-01 to 2025-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - exhibit99-1.htm 2207
